have h1 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
    have h21 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x)) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 0) := by
      have h22 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 0) := by
        have h23 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 0) := by
          apply Tendsto.const_mul
          simp
        exact h23
      have h24 : Tendsto (Real.sinh ∘ (fun x : ℝ => r * x)) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (Real.sinh 0)) := by
        apply Real.tendsto_sinhasinh
        exact h22
      have h25 : Real.sinh 0 = 0 := Real.sinh_zero
      rw [h25] at h24
      simpa using h24
    have h30 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (x : ℝ)) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (0 : ℝ)) := by
      simp
    have h36 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
      have h37 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
        have h38 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
          have h39 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
            apply Real.tendsto_sinh_div
            all_goals
              try { simpa using h21 }
              try { simpa using h30 }
          exact h39
        exact h38
      exact h37
    exact h36
  exact h1

have h1 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x)) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (0 : ℝ)) := by
    have h2 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 0) := by
      simp [Tendsto.mul_right]
    have h3 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x)) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (Real.sinh 0)) := by
      apply Real.tendsto_sinh
      exact h2
    have h4 : Real.sinh 0 = (0 : ℝ) := by
      simp [Real.sinh_zero]
    rw [h4] at h3
    exact h3
  have h4 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
    have h5 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) - r * x) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 0) := by
      have h6 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) - r * x) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 0) := by
        have h7 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x)) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (0 : ℝ)) := h1
        have h8 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (0 : ℝ)) := h2
        have h9 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) - r * x) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (0 - (0 : ℝ))) := by
          apply Filter.tendsto.sub h7 h8
        simpa using h9
      exact h6
    have h10 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * x) - r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 0) := by
      apply Filter.Tendsto.div_atTop
      all_goals
        try { 
          simpa using h5 
        }
        try { 
            simp [h2]
          }
    have h14 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * x) / x - r)) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 0) := by
      have h15 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * x) / x - r)) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 0) := by
        have h16 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * x) - r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 0) := h10
        have h17 : (fun x : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * x) / x - r)) = (fun x : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * x) - r * x) / x) := by
          funext x
          field_simp [show x ≠ 0 by 
            intro hx
            simp at hx ⊢
            all_goals try { tauto }
          ]
          <;> ring
        rw [h17]
        exact h16
      exact h15
    have h18 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
      have h19 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
        have h20 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
          apply Filter.Tendsto.add h14
          simp
        exact h20
      exact h19
    exact h18
  exact h4

have h1 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := by
    have h3 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 1) := by
      apply Real.tendsto_sinh_div
    have h4 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := by
      have h5 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 1) := h3
      simpa using h5
    exact h4
  have h2 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
    have h3 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) * r) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
      have h4 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := h1
      have h5 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) * r) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 (1 * r)) := by
        apply Tendsto.mul_const
        exact h4
      have h7 : 1 * r = r := by ring
      rw [h7] at h5
      exact h5
    have h8 : (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) = (fun x : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) * r) := by
      funext x
      by_cases h : r = 0
      · -- r = 0
        rw [h]
        simp
      · -- r ≠ 0
        have hr : r ≠ 0 := h
        by_cases hx : x = 0
        · -- x = 0
          rw [hx]
          simp [hr]
        · -- x ≠ 0
          have hxne : x ≠ 0 := by
            intro h0
            apply hx
            linarith
          have h9 : r * x ≠ 0 := by
            intro h0
            have : r = 0 := by
              apply (mul_left_inj' hxne).mp
              linarith
            contradiction
          field_simp [h9]
          <;> ring_nf <;> field_simp [h9] <;> ring
    rw [h8]
    exact h3
  exact h2

by_cases hr : r = 0
  · -- If r = 0, then the function is identically 0, so the limit is 0.
    rw [hr]
    simp
    all_goals try { simp }
  · -- If r ≠ 0, then we can rewrite the expression.
    have hr' : r ≠ 0 := by
      intro h
      apply hr
      linarith
    have h3 : ∀ x : ℝ, x ≠ 0 → (Real.sinh (r * x) / x) = (Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) * r := by
      intro x hx
      field_simp [show r ≠ 0 by exact hr']
      <;> ring_nf <;> field_simp [show r ≠ 0 by exact hr']
      <;> ring
    have h4 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 0) := by
      apply Tendsto.mul_const
      simp
    have h5 : Tendsto (fun y : ℝ => Real.sinh y / y) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 1) := by
      apply Real.tendsto_sinh_div
    have h6 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 1) := by
      have h7 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 1) := by
        have h8 : (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) = (fun y : ℝ => Real.sinh y / y) ∘ (fun x : ℝ => r * x) := by
          funext x
          simp
          <;> ring_nf <;> simp
        rw [h8]
        apply Tendsto.comp
        · -- The limit of `sinh y / y` as y → 0 is 1
          exact h5
        · -- The limit of `r * x` as x → 0 is 0
          exact h4
      exact h7
    have h7 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) * r) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 r) := by
      apply Tendsto.mul_const
      exact h6
    rw [show fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x = fun x : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) * r by funext x; by_cases hx : x = 0; · simp [hx]; · specialize h3 x hx; simpa using h3]
    exact h7

have h1 : Tendsto (fun (y : ℝ) => Real.sinh y / y) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 1) := by
    apply Real.tendsto_sinh_div
  have h2 : Tendsto (fun (x : ℝ) => r * x) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 0) := by
    continuity
  have h3 : Tendsto (fun (x : ℝ) => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 r) := by
    have h4 : Tendsto (fun (x : ℝ) => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 r) := by
      have h5 : Tendsto (fun (x : ℝ) => (Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) * r) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 r) := by
        have h6 : Tendsto (fun (x : ℝ) => (Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) * r) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 r) := by
          have h7 : Tendsto (fun (y : ℝ) => Real.sinh y / y) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 1) := h1
          have h8 : Tendsto (fun (x : ℝ) => r * x) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 0) := h2
          have h9 : Tendsto (fun (x : ℝ) => (fun (y : ℝ) => Real.sinh y / y) (r * x)) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 1) := by
            apply Tendsto.comp h7 h8
          have h10 : Tendsto (fun (x : ℝ) => (fun (y : ℝ) => Real.sinh y / y) (r * x) * r) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 r) := by
            apply Tendsto.mul_const h9 r
          have h11 : (fun (x : ℝ) => (fun (y : ℝ) => Real.sinh y / y) (r * x) * r) = (fun (x : ℝ) => (Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) * r) := by
            funext x
            simp
          rw [h11] at h10
          exact h10
        exact h6
      exact h4
    exact h3
  have h4 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 r) := h3
  apply Tendsto.at_nhdsWithin_of_nhds h4

        <;> ring
      have h14 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * x) - r * x) / x + r) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
        have h15 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * x) - r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 (0 : ℝ)) := h11
        have h16 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
          simp
        have h17 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * x) - r * x) / x + r) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 (0 + r)) := by
          apply Tendsto.add
          exact h15
          exact h16
        rw [show (0 + r : ℝ) = r by ring] at h17
        exact h17
      have h19 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
        have h20 : ∀ x : ℝ, x ≠ 0 → Real.sinh (r * x) / x = (Real.sinh (r * x) - r * x) / x + r := h13
        apply Tendsto.congr
        intro x hx
        exact h20 x hx
        exact h14
      exact h19
    exact h12
  exact h9

have h2 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x)) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (0 : ℝ)) := by
    apply Real.tendsto_sinhr
  have h3 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
    have h4 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x)) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (0 : ℝ)) := h2
    have h6 : (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) = (fun x : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * x) - r * x) / x + r) := by
      funext x
      field_simp [sub_eq_zero]
      <;> ring
    rw [h6]
    have h7 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * x) - r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 (0 : ℝ)) := by
      have h11 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * x) - r * x)) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (0 : ℝ)) := by
        have h12 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x)) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (0 : ℝ)) := h2
        have h13 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (0 : ℝ)) := by
          simp [mul_comm]
        have h14 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) - r * x) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (0 : ℝ)) := by
          apply Tendsto.sub
          exact h12
          exact h13
        exact h14
      have h15 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * x) - r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 (0 : ℝ)) := by
        apply Tendsto.div
        exact h11
        simp at *
        all_goals
          try { tauto }
          try { 
            have h17 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (x : ℝ)) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (0 : ℝ)) := by 
              exact tendsto_id_nhdsWithin
            exact h17
          }
          try { 
            have h17 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (x : ℝ)) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (0 : ℝ)) := by 
              exact tendsto_id_nhdsWithin
            exact h17
          }
      exact h15
    have h10 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * x) - r * x) / x + r) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
      have h11 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * x) - r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 (0 : ℝ)) := h7
      have h12 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (r : ℝ)) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (r : ℝ)) := by
        simp
      apply Tendsto.add
      exact h11
      exact h12
    exact h10
  exact h3

have h12 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := by
    apply Real.tendsto_sinh_div
  have h14 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * (Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x))) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
    have h16 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x)) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := h12
    have h17 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * (Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x))) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
      apply Tendsto.const_mul
      exact h16
    exact h17
  have h18 : (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) = (fun x : ℝ => r * (Real.sinh (r * x) / (r * x))) := by
    funext x
    by_cases h : x = 0
    · -- If x = 0, then both sides are undefined
      simp [h]
    · -- If x ≠ 0, then both sides are defined and equal
      have hx : x ≠ 0 := by
        intro h'
        apply h
        exact h'
      field_simp [hx]
      <;> ring
  rw [h18]
  exact h14
